permits.description: rehabilitation of old main library to new asian art museum
renovation and addition to (e) bldg adding approx. 12,000 sq feet of gallery space. fire protection under separate permit
construction of a temporary art installation w/in an (e) gallery space. work include temporary partitions, floor & ceiling finishes and modifications to (e) air conditioning and lighting systems

work includes and repl of (e) pedestal paver system including ramps and stairs . repair (e) waterproofind system as required. install (n) concrete stairs, ramps and curbs to replace matching (e) rise and run. tread depths and heights. install (n) handrails sim to (e) attachmts. demo ref 202205194618
plaster repair & repainting-ext walls,builtup roof, interior

fire only for the phase 2 fire alarm device replacement project; the devices being replaced are 171 smoke detectors, 33 duct detectors, and 150 modules. no ref. permit application number for this work.

MOVED, That the San Francisco Planning Commission (hereinafter "Commission") hereby CERTIFIES the Final Supplemental Environmental Impact Report (hereinafter SEIR)identified as case file No. 97.750E: Asian Art Museum, (hereinafter "Project") based upon the following findings: 1) The City and County of San Francisco, acting through the Planning Department (hereinafter "Department") fulfilled all procedural requirements of the California Environmental Quality Act (Cal. Pub. Res. Code Section 21000 etseg., hereinafter "CE

tle 14, Section 15000 et. seq., (hereinafter "CEQA Guidelines") and Chapter 31 of the San Francisco Administrative Code (hereinafter "Chapter 31"). a. On February 27, 1992, the Planning Commission certified a Final EIR, San Francisco Main Library (Case No. 90.808E, also referred to as the Main Library/Asian Art Museum FEIR), for a three-part project including construction of a new Main Library; conversion of the old Main Library building for use by the Asian Art Museum; and construction of a pedestrian mall on Fulton Street between the two buildings. b. The Planning Department prepared an EIR Addendum, dated May 1 , 1 996, that reviewed the Asian Art Museum portion of the project in light of changes in circumstances subsequent to certification of the prior EIR. c. The Department determined that a Supplemental EIR was required. The SEIR supplements information and analysis contained in the prior EIR and Addendum. It contains new descriptive material about
lternatives, including alternatives that would reduce effects on historic archit

documents.title: Asian Art Museum project : EIR addendum to the San Francisco Main Library FEIR
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
ocr_excerpts: SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBRARY 3 1223 04335 6352 City and County of San Francisco The Planning Department 1660 Mission Street San Francisco, CA 94103-2414 90.808E: Asian Art Museum Project EIR Addendum to the San Francisco Main Library FEIR May 1, 1996 DOCUMENTS DEPr. JUlO 51996 SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBRARY Draft EIR Published: November 7, 1991 Draft EIR Public Hearing Date: December 12, 1991 Draft EIR Public Comment Period: November 7 - December 23, 1991 Final EIR

NING COMMISSION PLANS AND PROGRAMS IMPLEMENTATION/ZONING 1-6414 (415)558-6414 (415)558-6264 (415)558-6377 FAX: 558-6409 FAX: 558-6426 I^jjg^ City and County of San Francisco ItfQgO) The Planning Department 1660 Mission Street San Francisco, CA 94103-2414 May 1, 1996 MEMORANDUM TO: File90.808E: Asian Art Museum Project FROM: Carol Roos, Office of Environmental Review RE: Addendum to San Francisco Main Library EIR certified in 1992 BACKGROUND On February 27, 1992, the City Planning Commission certified a Final EIR (Case No. 90.808E) for construction of a new main library (now complete) on the block bounded by Larkin, Fulton, Hyde and Grove Streets; conversion of the existing library building, on the block bounded by Larkin, McAllister, Hyde and Fulton Streets, for use by the Asian Art Museum; and construction of a pedestrian mall on Fulton Street between Larkin and Hyde Streets. The FEIR is referred to herein as the Main Library/Asian Art Museum FEIR. Since certification of the Main Library/Asian Art Museum FEIR, the Board of Supervisors approved designation of the Civic Center as a local Historic District under Article 10 of the City Planning Code. The district was proposed but not adopted at the time of EIR certification. Also since certification of the Main Library/ Asian Art Museum FEIR, the State of California published and certified an EIR for a state office building (referred to herein as the Civic Center Complex EIR) that reached a different conclusion about transportation effects, from generally the same data and analysis, than did the Main Library/Asian Art Museum FEIR. Section 31.35 of the San Francisco Administrative Code requires reevaluation of a project in certain cases when there is a modification to the project, the circumstances under which the project is to be undertaken or the information available for use in evaluation of the project and that, "if

and no ADMINISTRATION (415) 558-6414 CITY PLANNING COMMISSION (415) 558-6414 PLANS AND PROGRAMS (415) 558-6264 IMPLEMENTATION/ZONING (415) 558-6377 FAX: 558-6409 3 1223 04335 6352 FAX: 558-6426 further evaluation shall be required by this Chapter."
